---
title: "Elizabeth Mary Herbert"
---

## Elizabeth Mary Herbert

**Dates:** (1822-1911)

**Maiden name:** (A Court), Lady Herbert

### Description

widow of Sidney, 1st Lord Herbert of Lea

### Biography

She converted to Rome in January 1866, but rumours seem to have been circulating.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug. 26 [1865]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
